description_long: This research institute is a modern, multi-story building with a predominantly rectangular form and a flat roof. The facade features large glass panels, especially on the front and rear, allowing for ample natural light and visibility into the interior spaces. The structure is accented with vertical and horizontal elements in dark and light tones, likely representing concrete, metal, and glass materials. The building sits on a striped base that may represent a stylized plaza or parking area, with landscaping and outdoor seating visible near the entrance. The left side of the building includes a prominent vertical stairwell or elevator shaft, finished in a contrasting dark color. Rooftop areas appear to include green spaces and mechanical units, suggesting a focus on sustainability and functionality.
description: A modern, multi-story research institute with large glass facades, a flat roof, and a mix of dark and light exterior materials, set on a striped plaza with landscaped and rooftop features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, landscaped entry area, and outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dark vertical stairwell/elevator shaft and striped base.
description_view_2: Rear view with extensive glass panels and rooftop features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid wall, dark vertical element, and striped plaza.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is wide and set back from the facade, featuring large glass doors and adjacent windows. The entrance is accessible via a flat, open plaza with outdoor seating and landscaping, and there are no visible steps, suggesting wheelchair accessibility. The area is framed by planters and possibly benches, with no ornate decorative elements.
